 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.CustomizerNativeArrayPutSliceIndexInUV0_zThis MeshAssignCustomizer alters the UV data as it is being assigned to the mesh. It appends the Texture Array slice index in the UV.z channel

 ►CIDisposable
 ►CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombiner
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingleManages a single combined mesh.This class is the core of the mesh combining API
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MultiMeshCombinerThis class is an endless mesh. You don't need to worry about the 65k limit when adding meshes. It is like a List of combined meshes. Internally it manages a collection of MB2_MeshComber objects to which meshes added and deleted as necessary
 ►CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.IVertexAndTriangleProcessor
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.VertexAndTriangleProcessorThis is an abstraction layer between the MeshCombiner and the Mesh. It exists so that the MeshCombiner can use different APIs to interface with the Mesh. It needs to serialize its data with the MeshCombiner so it is responsible for managing the MeshCombiner data buffer fields
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MeshChannels
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MeshChannelsCacheAll getter methods in MeshChannelsCacheNew assume that CollectChannelDataForAllMeshesInList has first been called and the data is already present and accounted for
 ►CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_IMeshCombinerSingle_BoneProcessor
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MB_MeshCombinerSingle_BoneProcessor

 ►CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB2_EditorMethodsInterfaceM b2_ texture combiner editor methods. Contains functionality such as changeing texture formats Which is only available in the editor. These methods have all been put in a class so that the UnityEditor namespace does not need to be included in any of the the runtime classes

 CMB3_MeshBakerGrouper
 ►CMB3_MeshBakerRootRoot class of all the baking Components
 ►CMB3_MeshBakerCommonMaps a list of source materials to a combined material. Included in MB2_TextureBakeResults
 CMB3_MeshBakerComponent that manages a single combined mesh
 CMB3_MultiMeshBakerComponent that is an endless mesh. You don't need to worry about the 65k limit when adding meshes. It is like a List of combined meshes. Internally it manages a collection of CombinedMeshes that are added and deleted as necessary
 CMB3_TextureBakerComponent that handles baking materials into a combined material
 CMB_PreserveLightmapDataThis script is used to fix a bug where lightmapping on combined meshes is not preserved after reloading a scene or entering gamemode. This problem was caused by the lightmap index and scale offset data being lost. This script sets the lightmap index and scale offset back to where it should be so that lightmapping is actually preserved
 CDigitalOpus.MB.MBEditor.MB3_TextureBakerEditorInternal.MultiMatSubmeshInfo
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.ObjectLogLOD stores a buffer of log messages specific to an object. These log messages are also written out to the console

 CDigitalOpus.MB.MBEditor.MB_ReplacePrefabsSettings
 CMB2_TextureBakeResultsThis class stores the results from an MB2_TextureBaker when materials are combined into atlases. It stores a list of materials and the corresponding UV rectangles in the atlases. It also stores the configuration options that were used to generate the combined material
 ►CScriptableWizard
 CDigitalOpus.MB.MBEditor.MB_ConvertTextureArrayFormatWizard
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.SerializableIntArray
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.SerializableSourceBlendShape2CombinedIt is possible to combine multiple skinned meshes each of which may have blend shapes. This builds a map for mapping source blend shapes to combined blend shapes. The map can be serialized and saved in a prefab, this makes it possible to save combined meshes with Blend Shapes in a prefab
 CDigitalOpus.MB.Core.ShaderTextureProperty
